title: NLP Adjunct Port & MCP Toolkit Expansion

landed.name: Adjunct -> @beep/nlp v4 port (categorical spine, graph IR, tools, wink driver, MCP MVP)
landed.summary: Shipped via PR #199 (2026-05-30) + quality follow-ups 140ac179c8 / f3e0c3078f (2026-06-01). @beep/nlp categorical spine + Handoff IR + 19-tool NlpToolkit; @beep/wink driver; @beep/nlp-mcp 5-tool stdio MVP.

p1.name: Converge @beep/nlp-mcp onto the canonical NlpToolkit (5 -> 19 tools)
p1.summary: Replaced the driver's hand-rolled 5-tool system with McpServer.toolkit(@beep/nlp NlpToolkit) backed by @beep/wink WinkNlpToolkitLive; deleted src/Tools.ts + src/Schemas.ts. Surfaced and fixed two latent bugs (see reflection log).

p2.name: Adjunct-parity NLP tools (+6: Paragraphize, Stem, RemoveStopWords, WordCount, BagOfWords, Analyze)
p2.summary: New tool defs in @beep/nlp/Tools + handlers in @beep/wink WinkNlpToolkitLive; surface auto-flows to MCP (-> 25 tools).

p3.name: Streaming/file-IO suite (TextStream, Jsonl, DatasetLoader, Pipeline + 17 tools)
p3.summary: v4 port of adjunct Mcp/Streaming into @beep/nlp-mcp over effect/FileSystem + effect/Stream + HttpClient; line-based JSONL parser (S.UnknownFromJsonString) rather than Ndjson. Mounted as a second toolkit (StreamingToolkit + StreamingToolkitHandlersLive); regex compilation hardened to a tagged InvalidPatternError. 18 integration tests over synthetic temp fixtures; counts/path_length/size_bytes-only span attributes.

p4.name: Register, verify, document
p4.summary: Registered nlp-mcp in .mcp.json (nlp stdio server); verified 42 tools live over stdio via a JSON-RPC tools/list probe. Green across @beep/nlp, @beep/wink, @beep/nlp-mcp: check/test/test:integration/lint/build (TURBO_FORCE) + docgen + repo-exports:catalog:check. READMEs/CLAUDE.md surface maps + changeset added.

completionGate.statement: Not achieved until this goal's work ships as a PR driven to mergeable via /yeet (bun run beep yeet: repair -> verify -> publish --pr -> monitor).
